Paper: Predicting Stock Price Changes Based on the Limit Order Book: A Survey (Zaznov et al.)
Category: Survey
Notes: START HERE. Full taxonomy of LOB prediction; simulation-to-reality gap; FI-2010 critique. Read before any architecture paper.

Paper: LOB-based Deep Learning Models for Stock Price Trend Prediction: A Benchmark Study (Prata et al.)
Category: Benchmark
Notes: FI-2010 generalizability crisis confirmed. BINCTABL best generalizable model. LOBCAST framework. Read after DeepLOB (from prior review).

Paper: A Benchmark Study For LOB Models and Time Series Forecasting Models on LOB Data (ICLR 2025)
Category: Benchmark
Notes: LOB vs general TS models; CVML +244.9% on MPRF; asset transferability test. Read after LOBCAST.

Paper: Forecasting Mid-price Movements with High-Frequency LOB: A Dual-Stage Temporal Attention DLA (Guo & Chen)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: Dual temporal attention (input + hidden); 2nd best generalizable in LOBCAST; direct precursor to TLOB.

Paper: Axial-LOB: High-Frequency Trading with Axial Attention (Kisiel & Gorse)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: Factored 2D attention; 9615 params; feature-order invariant. Read alongside DLA as a contrast approach.

Paper: Short-term stock price trend prediction with imaging high frequency LOB data (Ye et al.)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: LOB as 2D image; CNN image classifier; handles price-scale heterogeneity. Different from attention-based approaches.

Paper: Deep Hybrid Models for Forecasting Stock Midprices from the High-Frequency Limit Order Book (Nguyen et al.)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: ResNet50+LSTM; pretrained ImageNet backbone; FDSE 2022 regional conference; no FI-2010 comparison.

Paper: Deep Limit Order Book Forecasting (Briola et al.)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: Main capstone paper. deepVOL + deepOF + seq2seq; microstructure priors; p_T metric; Indian market framing.

Paper: Bayesian Bilinear Neural Network for Predicting Mid-Price Dynamics in LOB Markets (Magris et al.)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: VOGN Bayesian TABL; calibrated uncertainty; outperforms MC Dropout; threshold-based trading decisions.

Paper: Mid-Price Forecasting in Limit Order Books with Gaussian Process Models (Liu)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: GPR best for long-horizon regression (+25-32% over TABL); calibrated uncertainty; combined linear+RBF kernel.

Paper: The Intraday Dynamics Predictor: TrioFlow Fusion of CNN and GRU for HF Price Movement Forecasting (Zaznov et al.)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: LOB+OF joint input (70 features); 3-branch CNN+GRU; MICEX Russian dataset; beats DeepLOB. Closest non-US market analog.

Paper: Deep Limit Order Book Forecasting: A Microstructural Guide (Briola et al.)
Category: LOB Architecture
Notes: Duplicate of Sl #1 — journal version of arXiv 2403.09267. Same notes file.

Paper: A Deep Learning Approach to Estimating Fill Probabilities in a Limit Order Book
Category: Predicts fill probability per level — different task from mid-price direction prediction

Paper: Detecting Multilevel Manipulation from LOB via Cascaded Contrastive Representation Learning
Category: Market manipulation detection — different task; surveillance/regulatory use case

Paper: Modeling of Limit Order Book Data with Ordered Fuzzy Numbers
Category: Fuzzy number representation for LOB — niche math approach; not DL prediction

Paper: Spread Movement Prediction for Pairs Trading with High-Frequency Limit Order Data
Category: Pairs trading spread prediction — different target variable from mid-price direction

Paper: Continuous-time Modeling of Financial Returns Based on Limit Order Book Data
Category: Stochastic process / point process modeling — methodology differs from DL classification

Paper: Analysis of Enhanced Hidden Markov Models for Improved Stock Market Price Forecasting
Category: HMM-based — not LOB-specific; uses OHLCV not tick data

Paper: Stock Market Price Analysis and Prediction of Financial Industry Based on the Time Series Method
Category: Generic time series prediction — no LOB data; not relevant to LOB survey

Paper: Effectiveness of Open High and Low Prices in Stock Market Price Prediction
Category: OHLC-based prediction — not LOB; uses daily/intraday bars not tick data

Paper: Stock Market Price Prediction and Forecasting Using Stacked LSTM
Category: Generic stacked LSTM tutorial — no LOB data; not relevant to LOB survey

Paper: Automated Creation of a High-Performing Algorithmic Trader via Deep Learning on Level-2 LOB Data
Category: RL-based trading agent creation — different task from mid-price direction prediction

Paper: Analyzing the Importance of Broker Identities in the Limit Order Book Through Deep Learning
Category: Uses broker identity data unavailable on most exchanges (incl. NSE); different angle
